is.t: MEPS Quota Update - December 2025
This spreadsheet contains data for the safeguard systems for both the European Union and the United Kingdom.
For ease of use the data has been split into separate tabs for each region/nation.
European Union - Tariff Rate Quotas
Notes on the source data
The European Union tab includes data on imports of finished steel products into the European Union.
Imports are assigned to one of 29 different product categories.
Quotas are administered quarterly on a first-come first-serve basis.
Many of the largest nations will receive a country specific quota, with tonnage allowances based on historical import volumes.
Unused quota tonnages are rolled over to the following quarter.
Where a nation does not receive a country specific quota their imports are counted in the "Other countries" category.
If a nation receiving a country specific quota completely uses its allowance throughout the year it may use the "Other countries" allowance in the April - June period.
From October 7 2022 an annual quota applies to imports of slab and billet from Russia. All other semi-finished material has been banned.
Source: EU Tariff quota consultation
United Kingdom - Tariff Rate Quotas
Notes on the source data
The United Kingdom tab includes data on imports of finished steel products into the United Kingdom.
Imports are assigned to one of 17 different product categories.
Quotas are administered quarterly on a first-come first-serve basis.
Many of the largest nations will receive a country specific quota, with tonnage allowances based on historical import volumes.
Unused quota tonnages are rolled over to the following quarter.
Where a nation does not receive a country specific quota their imports are counted in the "All others" category.
If a nation receiving a country specific quota completely uses its allowance throughout the year it may use the "All others" allowance in the April - June period.
Figures are update daily, with the latest available data correct as at the end of the previous working day.
Source: UK Integrated Online Tariff
Instructions for sorting the data
Clicking the bars in the slicers at the top of the table will filter the data by Quota Category, Country or Quota Allowance Granted.
Slicer filters can be applied separately, combined or cleared.
Select multiple categories by holding down the Ctrl key or clicking on the multiple selection symbol in the top right of the slicer box.
Use Clear Filters in the top right of the slicer box to remove applied filters.
Use the drop down menus in the table headers to organise and sort the data.
